Name: Percentage of SW-Awaiting EIC Decision out of all activity executions in the event log
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision' out of all cases

Name: Number of times SW-Awaiting EIC Decision occurs in the entire event log
Metric: Number of 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision' activities

Name: Percentage of variants that include SW-Awaiting EIC Decision as a step in the review process
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision' out of all cases

Name: Frequency of SW-Awaiting EIC Decision being directly preceded by SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision' out of all 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation'

Name: Percentage of SW-Awaiting EIC Decision occurrences that are followed by SW-EIC Accept
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision' out of all 'SW-EIC Accept'

Name: Percentage of SW-Awaiting EIC Decision occurrences that are followed by SW-EIC Reject
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision' out of all 'SW-EIC Reject'

Name: Frequency of SW-Awaiting EIC Decision appearing in variants that eventually lead to manuscript acceptance (e.g., followed by SW-EIC Accept or RW-EIC Accept)
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision' out of all 'SW-EIC Accept'

Name: Percentage of SW-Awaiting EIC Decision occurrences relative to the total number of SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation executions
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision' out of all 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation'

Name: Number of distinct case IDs (manuscripts) that reach the SW-Awaiting EIC Decision stage
Metric: Number of 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision' activities

Name: Percentage of SW-Awaiting EIC Decision occurrences that appear after at least one instance of SW-Reviewer Agreed in the same case
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision' out of all 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Frequency of SW-Awaiting EIC Decision occurring in variants with more than three reviewer-related activities (e.g., SW-Reviewer Agreed, SW-Reviewer Declined, SW-Reviewer No Response)
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision' out of all 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Percentage of SW-Awaiting EIC Decision steps that occur within 30 days of the original manuscript submission
Metric: the average of the function base < 30 where base is the number of times `ACTIVITY` == 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Ratio of SW-Awaiting EIC Decision to SW-Awaiting AE Assignment across all cases
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision' out of all 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment'

Name: Percentage of SW-Awaiting EIC Decision occurrences that are not followed by any further EIC decision activity (indicating potential stagnation)
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision' out of all cases where 'SW-EIC Accept' does not happen

Name: Percentage of SW-Awaiting EIC Decision occurrences that occur after exactly two or more SW-Reviewer Agreed activities in the same case
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision' out of all 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Number of SW-Awaiting EIC Decision instances that are part of the longest-running variants (top 10% by duration)
Metric: Number of 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision' activities

Name: Percentage of SW-Awaiting EIC Decision occurrences that follow a path including Immediate Reject Decision from the Checklist
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision' out of all 'Immediate Reject Decision from the Checklist'

Name: Frequency of SW-Awaiting EIC Decision being the last recorded activity in a case (i.e., no subsequent events logged)
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision' out of all cases

Name: Percentage of SW-Awaiting EIC Decision steps that occur in cases where the initial checklist was completed without reminders (i.e., no “SW-Checklist Completion is due” activities)
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision' out of all cases where 'SW-Checklist Completion is due in three days' does not happen

Name: Frequency of SW-Awaiting EIC Decision appearing in variants that include multiple revision cycles (e.g., contain both SW–Major Revision due in... and RW–Major Revision due in...)
